meta_description: Acetal or Polyoxymethylene (POM) is a high-performance thermoplastic well-suited for a wide range of applications due to its wear characteristics.

sections.heading: Compare Material Properties of Molded Acetal
sections.text: Compare Material Properties of Molded Acetal Tensile Strength ASTM D648 Flexural Modulus ASTM D790 Impact Strength, Izod ASTM D256 Heat Deflection ASTM D648 Data Sheet Celcon M90 9,570 psi 377 ksi 1.31 ft-lb/in 230.0 F View PDF RTP 800 GB 10 (10% Glass-Filled Acetal) 11,500 psi 550 ksi 1.0 ft-lb/in 270.0 F View PDF RTP 800 GB 20 (20% Glass-Filled Acetal) 14,000 psi 850 ksi 1.2 ft-lb/in 310.0 F View PDF

sections.heading: Acetal or POM Injection Molding Applications
sections.text: Acetal or POM Injection Molding Applications Acetal's strength and durability makes it a good resin choice for mechanical components such as: Gears Bearings Bushings Belt feeds and guides Rollers Fasteners Automotive parts
